markets.title: Will AGI be announced by any company before 2028?
markets.canonical_text: At least one company announces an AGI system before 2028-01-01.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if a named company publicly announces an AGI system before 2028-01-01 and the market moderator accepts the announcement.

markets.title: OpenAI is first company to announce AGI by 2027
markets.canonical_text: OpenAI is the first named company to announce an AGI system before 2028-01-01.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if OpenAI is judged first among listed companies to announce AGI before 2028-01-01.
